# Security policy (pointer)

The canonical security policy lives at the repository root: see
[/SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).

In short:

- Do **not** open a public GitHub issue for vulnerabilities.
- Use a private GitHub Security Advisory:
  <https://github.com/Hesper-Labs/leakshield/security/advisories/new>
- Or email `security@leakshield.io` (PGP key in `docs/pgp.txt`).

We will acknowledge within 48 hours and triage within 7 days.
